_doc: Layer inventory for the Population Atlas. Round 1 stubs the upstream layers that the scaffold's auto-derivation hooks (page8 breeding) and the F_ROH × H plane (page9 hatchery health) implicitly consume via window.state.*. Each entry is CONTRACT-ONLY: the actual files don't exist yet; the analysis pipeline (catfish-population-analysis + catfish-diversity-analysis MODULE_3) emits them in round 2+.

_tier_legend.hot: RAM-pinned at trigger event; pages read state directly; <1ms
_tier_legend.warm: IndexedDB-cached at trigger event; first read async ~50ms; subsequent ~10ms

_round1_status: All entries below are CONTRACT-ONLY (not-yet-loaded). The scaffold pages render their empty-state messages until the corresponding JSON files land.

per_sample_stats._feeds: page1 samples table · page8 breeding (auto-derived Diversity + Burden rows)

family_clusters._feeds: page3 families & clusters · page8 breeding (auto-derived Relatedness rows)

inversion_carriers._source_pipeline: Inversion Atlas — cross-atlas import from karyotype assignments + marker panel

marker_controls._feeds: page8 breeding (auto-derived Marker positive/negative control rows)
marker_controls._source_pipeline: Inversion Atlas — cross-atlas import from page18 marker_panel.json controls block

hatchery_health_cohorts._feeds: page9 F_ROH × H plane scatter + comparator table · page8 breeding (auto-derived hatchery-health verdict row)
hatchery_health_cohorts._source_pipeline: manual curation — focal cohort from MODULE_3 + literature peer cohorts

module_qc_summary._feeds: page2 coverage histogram · missingness scatter · QC pass/fail flags
